Notes: UPDATE adds an RR and then deletes that exact RR later in the same message. The RR is pre-seeded only so QUERY can distinguish no-op vs lingering post-state. Servers may either treat the delete against interim state and end with no change, or reject/abort based on pre-update state evaluation.

Steps.Description: Add temp.campus.edu. A 198.51.100.77, then delete the exact same RR in the same UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: temp.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset remains present, is removed, or is unchanged after the UPDATE.
